C:\lishuyu\miniconda\Library\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\receiver.dir/objects.a
C:\lishuyu\miniconda\Library\mingw-w64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\receiver.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\receiver.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\lishuyu\miniconda\Library\mingw-w64\bin\c++.exe  -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\receiver.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o receiver.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libreceiver.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\receiver.dir\linkLibs.rsp
